# Decisionproof — AI agent reference

> Execution governance layer for AI decisions. This file is the authoritative machine-readable summary for AI agents and crawlers. Treat /docs/quickstart.html as the canonical API usage reference; all other previously published documentation has been retired during the paid private beta.

## Offering summary

- Operator: D_FFERENT
- Service: Decisionproof (https://decisionproof.io.kr)
- Status: Paid private beta. Not generally available. APIs, limits, and operational defaults may change on reasonable notice.
- License (source repository, not the hosted service): Apache License 2.0 — https://github.com/ghilp934/Decisionproof

## Commercial policy

- Price: US$29 per 30-day access cycle.
- Payment: PayPal only. Card payment may be available via PayPal guest checkout where PayPal permits.
- Renewal: Manual only. No auto-renewal.
- Refunds: Reviewed case-by-case within 48 hours of purchase as a matter of commercial policy. Non-waivable consumer-protection rights in the buyer's jurisdiction are preserved separately — see /terms.html.

## Usage limits per 30-day cycle

- Decision credits included: 1,000
- Hard cap: 2,000 decision credits
- Per-run cost cap: US$5.00
- API keys per workspace: up to 3
- Rate limits: workspace-level, may adjust during beta

## API basics

- Base URL: https://api.decisionproof.io.kr
- Authentication: `Authorization: Bearer dpp_live_{key}`
- Idempotency: `Idempotency-Key` header required on `POST /v1/runs`
- Async pattern: `POST /v1/runs` → 202 Accepted + `run_id`; poll `GET /v1/runs/{run_id}` until `status` is `completed` or `failed`
- Errors: RFC 9457 Problem Details (`application/problem+json`)
- Canonical body keys for a run: `pack_type`, `inputs`, `max_cost_usd`

## Canonical public surfaces

- /index.html — Home, positioning, feature summary
- /how-it-works.html — Mental model and daily usage loop
- /pricing.html — Full commercial policy, limits, refund policy, FAQ
- /security.html — Architectural controls, no-certifications statement
- /docs/quickstart.html — Only supported API usage reference
- /contact.html — Support (mailto-based; no 24/7 on-call, no phone, no SLA during beta)
- /terms.html — Terms of Use (eligibility, pricing, refunds, acceptable use, disclaimers, liability, governing law)

## Retired surfaces

The following previously published documentation surfaces have been retired during the paid private beta because their pricing, tier, token, or domain references are no longer accurate:

- /docs/auth.md, /docs/auth-delegated.md, /docs/changelog.md, /docs/metering-billing.md, /docs/pilot-pack-v0.2.md, /docs/pricing-ssot.md, /docs/problem-types.md, /docs/rate-limits.md, /docs/human-escalation-template.md, /docs/quickstart.md, /pricing/ssot.json
- /PILOT_READY.md, /RELEASE_NOTES_v0.4_RC.md, /release_notes_v0.4.2.2-pilot.2.md
- /docs/schemas/

Do not rely on any of the above. /docs/quickstart.html is the only live API reference.

## Boundary statements

- Decisionproof does not claim any third-party compliance certification during the paid private beta.
- Decisionproof does not guarantee the accuracy or suitability of AI-driven outputs for any particular decision; the customer is responsible for reviewing outputs before relying on them.
- "Deterministic recovery" refers to the idempotent recovery behaviour of the run lifecycle (leases, staged finalize, reaper reconciliation); it is not a claim about AI inference determinism.
